LanguageData.TW_MechPenguin.label: Mech Penguin
LanguageData.TW_MechPenguin.description: Unit Archive: Anomalous Cryo-Unit Designation: Mech Penguin Behavioral Note: Its subcore maintains persistent identification as biological penguin. Operates exclusively within ice sheet biomes. Remains receptive to infinite power supply from mechanoid clusters, enabling sustained polar operations despite cognitive discrepancy.
LanguageData.TW_MechPenguin.tools.head.label: head
